text: BLOCKADE DAY 2: US destroyer intercepts 2 oil tankers leaving Chabahar port on Gulf of Oman side. CENTCOM confirms 6 ships total turned back in first 24 hours — no shots fired, no boardings. 5 of 6 were oil tankers. Blockade applies only to Iran-bound traffic. Non-Iranian Hormuz transits continue freely. This is the most significant peacetime naval interdiction since the Cuba quarantine.
verificationNote: BusinessWorld Online, NBC News, Jerusalem Post confirmed interdiction details.

text: TRUMP FOX BUSINESS: 'I think it's close to over, yeah. I view it as close to over.' Also: 'If I pulled up stakes it would take them 20 years to rebuild.' NOT thinking about extending ceasefire (expires April 21). Hints Round 2 Pakistan talks 'in next two days.' But CNN official: 'nothing scheduled.' Mixed signals. Oil rebounds modestly: Brent $95.72 (+1.0%), WTI $91.50 (+0.2%). API: US crude +6.1M bbl (8th straight build).
verificationNote: Fox Business, CNN, CNBC, OilPriceAPI confirmed statements and prices.

text: IRAN DEMANDS $270 BILLION in war compensation from US, Israel, and 5 Arab states. Government spokesperson describes figure as 'very crude' preliminary calculation. Pezeshkian: blockade 'doomed to failure.' Interior Minister Momeni instructs governors to 'neutralize the threat.' Araghchi: came to talks 'in good faith' but met with 'maximalism and shifting goalposts.' Iran rejecting US 20-year enrichment moratorium; countered with 5-year (also rejected).
verificationNote: Al Jazeera, ANI News, Times of Israel confirmed Iran demands and statements.

text: GUTERRES: 'There is no military solution to this crisis. Serious negotiations must resume.' Thanks Pakistan, Saudi Arabia, Egypt, Türkiye mediators. Switzerland reiterates Geneva offer. Xi-Lavrov confirmed meeting in Beijing — Lavrov says Russia could 'compensate' China's energy shortages. Pope Leo: 'I have no fear of the Trump administration.' Trump refuses to apologize after calling Pope 'WEAK on Crime.' Italy's Meloni calls Trump criticism 'unacceptable.'
verificationNote: UN News, Bloomberg, NBC News, Euronews confirmed all items.

text: Hezbollah fires 30+ rockets at northern Israel this morning (Times of Israel liveblog). 1 man injured. Meanwhile Bint Jbeil battle continues — IDF 98th Division encirclement nearing completion. IDF Northern Command Chief visited frontline yesterday. 10 soldiers wounded overnight in clashes. Armored battalion commander seriously injured. Bianco KIA confirmed (Humvee accident). 13 IDF soldiers killed in Lebanon since Feb 28.
verificationNote: Times of Israel liveblog, Jerusalem Post, Antiwar.com confirmed operations and casualties.

text: Day 47 AM roundup: Oil rebounds Brent $95.72 WTI $91.50. Trump: 'close to over,' won't extend ceasefire. US destroyer intercepts 2 tankers Chabahar. Iran demands $270B compensation. Pezeshkian: blockade 'doomed to failure.' Guterres: 'no military solution.' Xi-Lavrov Beijing. Hezbollah 30+ rockets at north. Switzerland offers Geneva. Araghchi: 'good faith' met 'maximalism.' API: crude +6.1M bbl. Gas $4.118 flat.
verificationNote: Compiled from Fox Business, CNN, BusinessWorld Online, Al Jazeera, ANI News, UN News, Bloomberg, Times of Israel, AAA.

text: BLOCKADE DAY 2 UPDATE: CENTCOM says blockade now "fully implemented" — 8 tankers intercepted (up from 6). Iran sea trade "completely halted." Iranian tanker with 2M barrels arrived unannounced near Gujarat, India — refiners may refuse it. 157.7M bbl Iranian oil floating. Trump: "permanently opening" Hormuz. 10,000+ US personnel enforcing. Sanctions waiver expires April 19 — 4 days.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera, JNS, Voice of Emirates confirmed CENTCOM announcement and 8-tanker figure.

text: IRAN RED SEA THREAT: Maj. Gen. Abdollahi (Khatam al-Anbiya) threatens Iran will block ALL shipping in Persian Gulf, Sea of Oman, AND Red Sea if US blockade continues. First time Iran explicitly threatens Red Sea — would need Houthi proxies. This is a massive escalation in rhetoric. Meanwhile Trump posts: "permanently opening" Hormuz, claims China agreed no weapons to Iran. Two maximalist positions colliding.
verificationNote: Newsweek, NBC News, Middle East Eye, PressTV confirmed Abdollahi statement. Business Today India confirmed Trump post.

text: MEDIATION PUSH: Pakistan army chief Field Marshal Asim Munir lands in Tehran with Interior Minister Naqvi. Carries Washington message. Trump tells NY Post talks "over next two days" — called back to say "more likely" thanks to Munir. Netanyahu i24 interview endorses Greater Israel vision — "historic and spiritual mission." Gofman approved Mossad chief (no intel background). Mixed signals: mediation urgency vs maximalist posturing.
verificationNote: Bloomberg, UPI confirmed Munir Tehran arrival. Times of Israel, Middle East Eye confirmed Netanyahu Greater Israel.

text: LEBANON CONTINUES TO BURN: Israeli strikes kill 13+ in southern Lebanon — Jbaa (4 killed, family home), Ansariyeh (5), Qadmus (4). One day after historic DC talks. IDF struck 200+ Hezbollah targets in 24h. Hezbollah responds with 70 rockets at northern Israel (Nahariya targeted, 2 injured). Qassem calls talks "free concession." Ali Nikzad (Iran parliament): revenge vow for Khamenei. Total Lebanon toll: 2,137 killed, 6,921 wounded.
verificationNote: Al Jazeera, Washington Times, Times of Israel confirmed Lebanon strikes and Hezbollah rockets.

text: Day 47 PM roundup: Iran threatens Red Sea/Gulf total blockade (Abdollahi). Trump "permanently opening" Hormuz — China no-weapons deal. Pakistan army chief Munir in Tehran. CENTCOM: blockade "fully implemented" 8 tankers. Israel kills 13 in Lebanon. Netanyahu Greater Israel. Hezbollah 70 rockets. IMF: 3.1% growth, recession warning. EIA: Q2 Brent peak $115. Oil Brent $96.80. S&P 7,000. Harvard: $1T cost. Rubio meets Egypt FM. Gas $4.118.
verificationNote: Compiled from Newsweek, NBC News, Bloomberg, Business Today India, Al Jazeera, Times of Israel, PBS, Axios, AAA, State Dept.

text: PENTAGON BOMBSHELL: Hegseth/Caine briefing reveals Epic Fury stats — 90%+ of Iran's regular naval fleet sunk (~150 ships at bottom of ocean), 13,000+ targets struck, 80% air defense destroyed, 90% weapons factories attacked. Iran declared 'combat ineffective for years.' But US intel estimates ~50% of missile launchers remain intact underground. Satellite imagery shows Iran clearing debris at Khomein + Tabriz South missile bases.
verificationNote: C-SPAN, CBS News confirmed Pentagon briefing. Israel Hayom, Iran International confirmed satellite imagery.

text: HEGSETH IMPEACHMENT: Rep. Yassamin Ansari (D-AZ) — first Iranian-American Democrat in Congress — files 6 articles of impeachment. Charges: unauthorized war, targeting civilians, Signalgate classified info mishandling, obstruction of Congress, abuse of power. 8 co-sponsors. Pentagon: 'another charade.' Dead on arrival in GOP-controlled House but establishes congressional record. Meanwhile 10,000+ US troops deploying — USS Bush CSG + Boxer ARG/11th MEU arriving late April.
verificationNote: Axios, UPI, NOTUS confirmed impeachment. Washington Post, Al Jazeera confirmed troop deployment.

text: CEASEFIRE WATCH: Bloomberg/Fortune report 'in-principle agreement' to extend ceasefire by 2 weeks (expires April 21). BUT US 'has not formally agreed.' Three sticking points: nuclear program (US wants 20yr moratorium, Iran offered 5yr), Hormuz reopening, $270B war compensation. Leavitt: 'We feel good.' Vance: 'I feel very good.' Trump: 'not thinking about extending.' Contradictory signals but momentum building. Pakistan army chief Munir mediating in Tehran.
verificationNote: Bloomberg, Fortune, Axios confirmed ceasefire extension reports. PressTV confirmed Araghchi-Munir meeting.

text: UAE-IRAN CALL: First high-level contact since February — VP Mansour bin Zayed called Parliament Speaker Qalibaf on de-escalation. Gulf states positioning for post-war diplomacy. Meanwhile Iran rejects UAE-backed IMO 'safe maritime corridor' at Legal Committee as 'procedurally invalid.' Baghaei: 'Iran is not blockadable — all means of pressure will fail.' CENTCOM: blockade now 9 tankers turned back. USS Spruance intercepts Iranian-flagged vessel fleeing Bandar Abbas.
verificationNote: Gulf News, Khaleej Times confirmed UAE-Iran call. PressTV confirmed IMO rejection. Military Times confirmed USS Spruance intercept.

text: Day 47 EVE roundup: Pentagon — 150 Iranian ships sunk, 13K targets, 80% air defense destroyed. Hegseth impeachment 6 articles filed. Ceasefire extension 'in-principle' (Bloomberg). UAE-Iran first call since Feb. 10K+ US troops deploying (USS Bush CSG + Boxer ARG). Blockade 9 tankers. S&P 500 record 7,022 — all war losses erased. Nasdaq 24,000+. Lebanon 2,167 killed. 3 paramedics killed Mayfadoun triple-tap. Hezbollah 40+ rockets. Oil Brent $95.72. Gas $4.108 (down 1¢).
verificationNote: Compiled from C-SPAN, CBS News, Axios, Bloomberg, Fortune, Gulf News, Washington Post, Al Jazeera, WAFA, Yahoo Finance, CNN, AAA.

text: MAJOR ESCALATION: IRGC Maj. Gen. Abdollahi on state TV threatens to block ALL shipping in Persian Gulf, Sea of Oman, AND Red Sea. This expands Iran's previous threat from Gulf-only to three waterways — signals potential Houthi reactivation in Yemen.
verificationNote: NBC News, Fox News, Newsweek, Al Jazeera all confirmed the statement.

text: Treasury 'Economic Fury' sanctions hit 24+ entities in Shamkhani oil smuggling network + oil-for-gold Hezbollah financing. State Dept calls it 'upending the shadow fleet.' Sanctions waiver expires April 19 — NOT being renewed. Iran's economic isolation deepening rapidly.
verificationNote: US Treasury press release sb0443 and State Dept statement confirmed.

text: Senate votes: 4th war powers resolution blocked 47-52 (Rand Paul sole GOP for; Fetterman sole Dem against). Sanders Israel arms sales: defeated 40-59 and 36-63 but RECORD 40 Democratic senators voted to block — Kelly (D-AZ) notable flip. 60-day War Powers Act deadline hits April 29.
verificationNote: Roll Call, Haaretz, The Intercept confirmed vote tallies.

text: IDF 98th Division nearing full control of Bint Jbeil — 100+ Hezbollah killed since battle began April 9. 3 Radwan special forces fighters captured. Sgt. Maj. Bianco (30, 188th Armored) killed; 13 wounded. IDF says 'within a few days, there won't be major fights left in Lebanon.'
verificationNote: Jerusalem Post, Times of Israel, Naharnet confirmed.

text: Day 48 AM roundup: Iran threatens Gulf/Oman/Red Sea total shipping blockade (Abdollahi). Treasury 'Economic Fury' sanctions — 24+ Shamkhani entities. Sanctions waiver expires April 19. Senate blocks 4th war powers res (47-52). Record 40 Dems vote to block Israel arms. Rubio: first Israel-Lebanon talks since 1993. IDF soldier KIA Bint Jbeil. 98th Div nearing full control. Hezbollah 30 rockets at Nahariya. NPC suspends petrochemical exports. Trump: 'very close to over.' Vance: 'grand bargain.' Pakistan chief Munir in Tehran. Wang Yi-Araghchi call.
